heading: State control over standards
label: 7924 State control over standards
notes: Effective DateSection effective , except with respect to certain noncompetitive programs and competitive programs, see , set out as an Effective Date of 2015 Amendment note under .Dec. 10, 2015section 5 of Pub. L. 114–95section 6301 of this title
amendments: Effective DateSection effective , except with respect to certain noncompetitive programs and competitive programs, see , set out as an Effective Date of 2015 Amendment note under .Dec. 10, 2015section 5 of Pub. L. 114–95section 6301 of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Nothing in this chapter shall be construed to prohibit a State from withdrawing from the Common Core State Standards or from otherwise revising their standards.

children.heading: Prohibition
children.label: b Prohibition
children.text: No officer or employee of the Federal Government shall, directly or indirectly, through grants, contracts or other cooperative agreements, through waiver granted under or through any other authority, take any action against a State that exercises its rights under subsection (a).section 7861 of this title
